name: MCP Server Throughput
description: Measures MCP server requests-per-second (rps) and latency percentiles: 50 parallel fan-out calls + 200 sequential steady-state calls. Target default is mcp.holoscript.net/health.
note: rps comparator: higher-is-better (8% threshold). p95LatencyMs comparator: lower-is-better (10% threshold). Falls back to localhost:3001 if HOLO_MCP_THROUGHPUT_TARGET is unset and the default is unreachable.
